ul.li: Memory Alignment: All entries must be aligned to 8-byte boundaries.
Atomic Updates: Header head_ptr and tail_ptr MUST be updated via atomic MOV (x86_64) to ensure consistency during concurrent recovery.
Header Integrity: CRC64 (polynomial: 0x42F0E1EBA9EA3693) covers offsets 0x000 through 0x02F.

Circular Buffer Logic:
IsFull = ((head + 1) % size == tail)
RecoveryRange = [tail, head)
Page Boundary: Bold borders denote 4KB physical page frame boundaries.

g.text: DATA PAYLOAD: { inode: 1024, mode: 0644, uid: 0, gid: 0 }
